name: financial-risk-scanner
description: Scan listed company financial statements for 21 types of fraud risk indicators using Tushare API. Detect cash-debt paradox, receivables anomalies, inventory issues, cash flow divergence, audit concerns, and governance risks. Supports A-share market analysis with comprehensive risk reports.
author: laigen

TUSHARE_TOKEN.description: Tushare Pro API Token for Chinese A-share market data. Required to fetch financial statements, balance sheets, and market data. Register at: https://tushare.pro/register

limitations: Only supports A-share market (Chinese listed companies)
Historical data limited to last 10 years
Related party transaction data requires manual verification from annual reports
